commands.repair_reason: Human maintainer review is needed to choose the exec-wrapper versus plugin route and to require contributor-supplied live secrets proof; this is not a safe automated repair lane.; Needs attention: The diff adds a secret-handling exec wrapper that invokes a nested bw binary from PATH, which needs hardening before merge.; Review finding: [P1] Resolve bw through a trusted absolute path — scripts/bw-exec-resolver.mjs:29... (sha=8dd511baf551a92370f9822fb63861b3549b6186)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Bitwarden/Vaultwarden SecretRef documentation plus a protocol-v1 `bw` CLI exec resolver script, type declarations, and tests for batch secret resolution.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: source inspection shows the wrapper runs `bw` from PATH and the PR docs/tests show mocked-only verification. There is not yet a high-confidence live Bitwarden/Vaultwarden behavior proof from the contributor.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer review is needed to choose the exec-wrapper versus plugin route and to require contributor-supplied live secrets proof; this is not a safe automated repair lane.
